column1: ## NL Championship Drought (years since most recent NL title)
- Cardinals totals include Boston Beaneaters (until 1953) and Milwaukee Braves (until 1966) franchises.
- Pittsburgh totals (1882-1886) includes former NA Pittsburgh Alleghenys; early franchise history sometimes over-counted in MLB (rosters).
- Brooklyn Dodgers totals include Boston Braves pre-1953 era (teamed with Boston Reds franchise).
- Rockies (33 seasons) represent the worst all-time franchise record in the NL with 2,618 wins against 3,292 losses (.443 Win%).
- Brewers totals (49 NL seasons from 1998) account for 5 NL Central division titles.
